heading: Wednesday Night
text: Variable clouds and wildfire smoke. Slight chance of an evening shower northeast. Lows from the upper 50s to mid 60s, with some mid 50s northeast and in the Adirondacks. West to northwest winds gusting to 25 mph early, then becoming west and decreasing to 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Thursday
text: Periods of wildfire smoke. Otherwise mostly sunny south. Increasing clouds north, with a chance of showers and thunderstorms, mainly in the afternoon. Highs the low to mid 80s south, and upper 70s to lower 80s north, with some mid 70s northeast. West to northwest winds 10 to 15 mph, and gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Chance of early showers or a thunderstorm north, slight chance in the south. Lows from the mid 50s to lower 60s, some lower 50s northeast. Northwest winds gusting to 25 mph early, then decreasing to 5 to 10 mph.
